csv_report.title: Top Memberships
csv_report.sql:
SELECT
  mp.plan_name,
  COUNT(*)                                      AS total_sales,
  ROUND(SUM(mp.plan_price_dollars), 2)          AS total_revenue_dollars,
  ROUND(AVG(mp.plan_price_dollars), 2)          AS avg_price_dollars,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mp.state = 'active'    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mp.state = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_count,
  MAX(mp.plan_price_dollars)                    AS Price,
  (
    SELECT ca.class_name
    FROM vw_memberships m2
    JOIN vw_class_attendance ca
      ON ca.customer_id = m2.customer_id
     AND ca.status = 'confirmed'
     AND ca.checked_in_at IS NOT NULL
    WHERE m2.plan_name = mp.plan_name
      AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', m2.purchased_at) >= '2026-04-20'
      AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', m2.purchased_at) <= '2026-05-20'
    GROUP BY ca.class_name
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS top_class,
  (
    SELECT ca.customer_name
    FROM vw_memberships m3
    JOIN vw_class_attendance ca
      ON ca.customer_id = m3.customer_id
     AND ca.status = 'confirmed'
     AND ca.checked_in_at IS NOT NULL
    WHERE m3.plan_name = mp.plan_name
      AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', m3.purchased_at) >= '2026-04-20'
      AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', m3.purchased_at) <= '2026-05-20'
    GROUP BY ca.customer_id, ca.customer_name
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS top_visiting_customer
FROM vw_memberships mp
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m-%d', mp.purchased_at) >= '2026-04-20'
  AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', mp.purchased_at) <= '2026-05-20'
GROUP BY mp.plan_name
ORDER BY total_revenue_dollars DESC

history.title: Top memberships
history.sql:
SELECT
  mp.plan_name,
  COUNT(*)                                      AS total_sales,
  ROUND(SUM(mp.plan_price_dollars), 2)          AS total_revenue_dollars,
  ROUND(AVG(mp.plan_price_dollars), 2)          AS avg_price_dollars,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mp.state = 'active'    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mp.state = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_count,
  MAX(mp.plan_price_dollars)                    AS Price,
  (
    SELECT ca.class_name
    FROM vw_memberships m2
    JOIN vw_class_attendance ca
      ON ca.customer_id = m2.customer_id
     AND ca.status = 'confirmed'
     AND ca.checked_in_at IS NOT NULL
    WHERE m2.plan_name = mp.plan_name
      AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', m2.purchased_at) >= '2026-04-20'
      AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', m2.purchased_at) <= '2026-05-20'
    GROUP BY ca.class_name
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS top_class
FROM vw_memberships mp
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m-%d', mp.purchased_at) >= '2026-04-20'
  AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', mp.purchased_at) <= '2026-05-20'
GROUP BY mp.plan_name
ORDER BY total_revenue_dollars DESC
